# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts
    - echo "binary_content" > artifacts/myapp
    - echo "config_content" > artifacts/config.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main

deploy_job1:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying application..."
    - ls -la
    - echo "Running binary..."
    - ./artifacts/myapp
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main

deploy_job2:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying configuration..."
    - ls -la
    - cat artifacts/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main
